description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a quilted, padded top surface and a uniform, boxy profile. The top features a subtle diamond-patterned stitching, giving it a plush and cushioned appearance. The sides are smooth with a faint horizontal seam and small, evenly spaced tufting details, suggesting reinforced edge support. The color is a clean, light gray or off-white, and the surface appears soft and slightly textured. There is no visible branding, tags, or stains on any side. The mattress is of standard thickness and would be suitable for use on a bed frame or as a standalone sleeping surface in an urban environment.
description: A light gray, quilted mattress with a diamond-stitched top and smooth, reinforced sides. The surface is soft and clean, with no visible branding or stains.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width and quilted top surface, with the side seam and tufting details visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the mattress's depth and the continuous edge piping, with the quilted top slightly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the width and smooth side with subtle tufting and seam.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the mattress's depth and edge piping.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted diamond pattern stitched across the top surface, with a smooth, plain border on the sides.
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous, slightly raised piping runs along all edges, matching the main color and providing a defined border.
